settings.title: The People Who Actually Hold Your Keys
settings.excerpt: Trusting someone with a key to your home is no small thing, so here is who that someone is.
settings.body:
Letting a cleaner into your home is an act of trust, and we never take it lightly. So it seems only fair you know who our teams are.

We work in steady pairs rather than sending whoever is free. Most of our clients see the same two faces every week, which is how Maria and Joanna have ended up knowing exactly which mug a regular likes left on the draining board.

Everyone on the team is vetted, insured, and trained on our methods before they set foot in a client's home alone.

If your usual pair is ever off, we tell you in advance who is coming instead. No strangers turning up unannounced, ever.
